# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyIGW

  Subnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: Subnet1

  Subnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1b
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: Subnet2

  RouteTablePublic:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicRouteTable

  RouteTablePrivate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateRouteTable

  RoutePublic:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      DependsOn: InternetGateway
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTablePublic
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  Subnet1RoutePrivate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTablePrivate

  Subnet2RoutePrivate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTablePrivate

  NATGatewayEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NATGATEWAY_EIP

  NATGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NATGatewayEIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyNATGW

  RoutePrivateNAT:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTablePrivate
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway

Outputs:
  VPCID:
    Description: The ID of the created VPC.
    Value: !Ref VPC
